$comment: Non-authoritative cache. Regenerate at the end of any session that changed runtime truth or any contract. Never a source of truth.
purpose: Fast re-grounding snapshot. Lets a new session orient without re-reading the whole repo.

on_read: Treat every entry here as non-authoritative cache
Verify against runtime truth before acting on any claim in this file
If this file is older than the most recent runtime-truth change, regenerate before proceeding
